BGCP Careers


NOW HIRING:  2026-2027 SCHOOL YEAR - YOUTH PROGRAM LEADERS

We’re hiring enthusiastic, committed Youth Program Leaders for the 2026-27 school year across San Mateo County. Whether you’re passionate about education, youth development, or community impact, this is your opportunity to make a difference while building valuable experience.

As a Youth Program Leader (YPL), you will:

  • Facilitate hands-on academic and enrichment activities for elementary and middle school students

  • Inspire and mentor youth through relationship-building and daily engagement

  • Develop your leadership, classroom management, and youth development skills

  • Foster a safe, inclusive, and fun learning environment

Compensation: $22.00-$25.00 per hour (depending on experience)

Locations: Menlo Park, East Palo Alto, Redwood City, San Mateo, Daly City, and South San Francisco

Join us in building a school year filled with inspiration, learning, and care.

Apply Today & Make an Impact!

By submitting this form, you are granting: Boys & Girls Clubs of the Peninsula, 401 Pierce Rd., Menlo Park, California, 94025, United States, http://www.bgcp.org permission to email you. You may unsubscribe via the link found at the bottom of every email. (See our Email Privacy Policy for details.) Emails are serviced by Constant Contact.
